productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's White Mickey Abhoy Red Set of 2 Kidswear
description: CompositionSet of two t-shirtst-shirt 1 - Dark blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with red ribbed crew neck, red overlock stitch detailing on hemlines and graphic on the chestT-shirt 2 - White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, with blue ribbed crew neck, red sleeves, contrast overlock stitch detailing on hemlines and graphic on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours in cold waterGentle cycleDo not soak or wringDo not bleach or tumble dryTurn inside out before dryingUse warm ironDo not iron on prints and studsIndulge the little sailor in your little boy in these two t-shirts in white and blue. The white, red and blue colour combo, being the signature colours of the sea farer, brings a bit of adventre to the two tees. The graphic of mickey on both will make your little boy feel cheerful and bright all year. Made of 100% organic cotton fabric,  it's extra soft and comfy on his tender skin. Team this tee with crocs footwear for that cute look.
